description_long: This is a modern, two-story copy shop or print shop with a striking open-frame architectural design. The structure features a prominent rectangular roof supported by thick white columns, with a partially enclosed upper floor accessible via a wide staircase. The lower level has a wood-textured floor and a partially open wall, while the upper level includes a meeting area with a table and chairs. Large, vibrant printed graphics are displayed on the exterior columns and along the upper interior wall, adding color and branding. The shop is set on a black rectangular base, suggesting a dedicated plot or exhibition space.
description: A modern, two-story copy shop with open-frame architecture, large printed graphics, and a prominent staircase leading to an upper meeting area.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main entrance, staircase, and large printed graphics on the columns.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the staircase, upper meeting area, and interior wall graphics.
description_view_2: Rear-right view focusing on the back wall and the open upper floor with visible furniture.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the entrance, exterior graphics, and the open design of the shop.
attribute_signage: The shop features 'PRINT' branding with a colorful logo on the upper front and side facades, as well as large printed graphics on the vertical columns and an interior wall.
attribute_posters_or_sample_prints_displ: Large sample prints or posters are displayed as part of the exterior column graphics and along the upper interior wall, featuring vibrant, colorful imagery.
attribute_architectural_style: modern; characterized by open-frame construction, clean lines, large rectangular forms, and extensive use of white surfaces with integrated graphic displays.
